ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "dataset_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset size */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hashing algorithm */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run of the performance test */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment where the test was run */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., time, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Code representing any errors that occurred during the test */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed message describing the error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_size_id") REFERENCES dataset_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset size */,
  "size_value" INTEGER /* Size value of the dataset (e.g., 8, 16, 32) */,
  "size_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the dataset size (e.g., K, KB, MB) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashing algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashing algorithm (e.g., HAMTC, HAMTL) */,
  "algorithm_description" TEXT /* Description of the hashing algorithm */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_url" TEXT /* Link to the official documentation or source code of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hashing algorithm */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., system, user) */,
  "config_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the configuration is applicable (e.g., production, development) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_configurations_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset size */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., random, real-world) */,
  "dataset_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "dataset_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the dataset to ensure data integrity */,
  "dataset_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_dataset_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_size_id") REFERENCES dataset_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hashing algorithm */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_revision_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision log */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm version */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., bug fix, feature addition) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the revision log (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "log_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_revision_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES algorithm_versions ("version_id")
)
